title: Align test suite to shared BDD only
description: Remove any Rust unit tests and pytest-style tests so only shared Gherkin specs drive behavior for both runtimes.
creator: ryan

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting cleanup: will remove Rust #[cfg(test)] unit tests and any pytest tests to keep only shared Gherkin specs.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Removed all Rust #[cfg(test)] unit test modules and deleted pytest-style tests so only shared Gherkin specs remain.
